summary_text: **Findings** 1. `Critical` External generator path is still fully executable and bypasses the new local tone-balance guard. `GENERATOR_MODE` still accepts `external`, resolves to `~/Dev/x-auto/scripts/generate_draft_candidates.py`, and executes it directly: [xauto-draft-only.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L16), [xauto-draft-only.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L30), [xauto-draft-only.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L175), [xauto-draft-only.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L192). 2. `High` Execute-time safety parity is inconsistent: `REQUIRE_PROMOTABLE_ON_EXECUTE` is enforced only for `registry-local`, not `external`. This allows `external` execute to finish successfully even when no promotable candidates exist: [xauto-draft-only.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L380). 3. `High` Recovery/closeout safety is registry-local-only; external has no equivalent safety path. Blocked recovery is gated to `registry-local` only, so external runs skip that hardening route entirely: [xauto-draft-only.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L265). 4. `Medium` Help text is inconsistent with runtime default, which can cause operator misrouting. Default is `registry-local` in code, but usage says default is `external`: [xauto-draft-only.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L16), [xauto-draft-only.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L47). 5. `Medium` `ALLOW_EXTERNAL_NOTION_WRITE` only controls Notion write, not generator trust/safety. Even with write blocked, unguarded external generation remains allowed: [xauto-draft-only.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L179), [xauto-draft-only.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L202). **Safest Minimal Patch (recommended behavior)** 1. Make `registry-local` the only allowed mode by default and fail fast on `--generator-mode external` with `exit 2` and a clear error message. 2. Keep an explicit break-glass override only if needed, e.g. `X_AUTO_ALLOW_UNGUARDED_EXTERNAL_GENERATOR=true`; otherwise reject external unconditionally. 3. If break-glass is kept, force `MODE=smoke` and disallow `--write-notion` regardless of `ALLOW_EXTERNAL_NOTION_WRITE` to avoid unsafe publish-side effects. **Minimal Test Strategy** 1. Add one contract-style shell test that asserts explicit external mode is rejected by default (`exit 2`, expected error message). 2. Add one test that validates help/default consistency (`--generator-mode` usage default must match runtime default). 3. Add one negative execute test: external + execute (+ write flag envs) must still fail by default. 4. If break-glass is implemented, add one gated positive test: with break-glass env set, external is allowed only in smoke mode and without Notion write. No files were edited in this review.
